name: hacktraining-webapps
description: Attack/defense training range for web application security

scripts.build: npm run build -w @hacktraining/shared && npm run build -w @hacktraining/app1-helpdesk && npm run build -w @hacktraining/app2-billing-vulnerable && npm run build -w @hacktraining/app2-billing-reference && npm run build -w @hacktraining/scoreboard && npm run build -w @hacktraining/flag-planter && npm run build -w @hacktraining/checker
scripts.build:platform: npm run build -w @hacktraining/shared && npm run build -w @hacktraining/scoreboard && npm run build -w @hacktraining/flag-planter && npm run build -w @hacktraining/checker
